thought: I have 5 outbound options. The cheapest nonstop is HK Express UO 02:30 at HK$2,340. Korean Air KE at HK$1,980 is cheaper but has 1 stop, so not nonstop. I will note the cheapest nonstop as option 1 and now advance to the return-leg selection to pair itineraries.

thought: I now have both outbound and return options. I will compose Itinerary 1 — the cheapest nonstop combination: HK Express UO 02:30 outbound + HK Express UO 14:00 return. Total = HK$2,340 + HK$2,380 = HK$4,720. This is the cheapest nonstop but departs very early at 02:30.
action: echo "Itinerary 1: HK Express UO 02:30/06:30 + UO 14:00/16:10 | Nonstop both ways | Total HK$4,720"
